title: Hello everyone any kind of help or suggestion would be great
author: PermitMoist3776
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/8l2lipozfibg1.png?width=1438&format=png&auto=webp&s=c07c8c4f08b5456bc00d17f4dcb1375fe7151b60

https://preview.redd.it/l5qnrut4gibg1.png?width=1473&format=png&auto=webp&s=6c0b51ad22777e3e8e93acbfefeb89c7f18ad075

I’ve been trading for the last 1.5 months, mostly bot-based trading, but my win ratio is really poor. Any kind of help would be greatly appreciated. I’m happy to share my code if anyone wants to collaborate or review it. Collaboration is also welcome. Some of the bigger losses you might notice in the screenshot are from days when I made extra changes to the strategy — that’s where most of the drawdown came from. For context, I’m using $6 per trade with no leverage. The bot runs 24/7, so as a result there are a higher number of trades every day.

comments.author: LiveBeyondNow
comments.body: Is it an off-the-shelf bot or one you developed?  Most off the shelf ones I suspect are time and money sinks.  I’m happy to see if I can improve your strategy for you if helpful. What platform / language? You’re welcome to DM.

replies.author: PermitMoist3776
replies.body: im using binance api key and the thing is that i do make money but by the end of the day its truns into red i think overtrading is also one reason thats why i tried to work on realized pnl hit the threshold then stop it but it also didnt work as i wished i can share u my code if u can give any sort of insights would be great shall i dm u ????

replies.author: PermitMoist3776
replies.body: i developed it by my seld and hosted in ubuntu machine with 24/7 up im using systemed for that

replies.author: LiveBeyondNow
replies.body: Yeah sure, DM me thanks. I’ll share anything I can find and see if it can apply in some other way in the market.

comments.author: Axirohq
comments.body: For me, the biggest shift wasn’t a single setup but sticking to one strategy long enough to truly understand it. It took months, not weeks for the patterns, edge, and psychology to click. If I could tell my younger self one thing: patience beats impatience every time.

comments.author: SynchronicityOrSwim
comments.body: You can't code a strategy until you have a strategy worth coding.  Learn to trade profitably first.

replies.author: PermitMoist3776
replies.body: well in trending market it works pinpoint and overtrading might be the profit eater for my strategy cuz it run 24/7

comments.author: user_alpha231
comments.body: 24/7 bots often suffer from overtrading. Stricter entry filters and fewer trades usually improve results.

replies.author: PermitMoist3776
replies.body: yes my thaught were also same most of the time when i start the day its profitbale but by the time days end like midnight i loose that gain and some extra

replies.author: user_alpha231
replies.body: That’s interesting , are you running it across all sessions or mostly one market? Sometimes just restricting to one high-quality window makes a big difference.

replies.author: PermitMoist3776
replies.body: well i was runnning 24/7 but now im planning to stick to couple of hours of us market like pick 4-5 and another to asian session same 4-5 hours what do u think i can dm u and u can have more discussion if ur free

comments.author: Tony_Chan_NYC
comments.body:
it sounds like this strategy might not be profitable. Research a new strategy or enhance your strategy. 

"from days when I made extra changes to the strategy" are you updating this daily? if that is the case, it will be difficult to tell what is the issue?  
PM me your strategy if you want to bounce idea.
